It’s a great game, and I don’t know why people don’t like it

Overall, it’s a great game at the start, but then… Things started to go downhill. I was normally playing when I first installed it and you could use mods and everything and then I got on recently and the entire map has changed to forest, yeah… OG forest. And then mods have just like disappeared and all I have is long arms. Pretty awesome game though it’s fun probably worth the purchase just to have normal forest, and long arms.
